en: The first attempts to assume friendship and love are constellated in the strongest manner possible by the relation to parents, and here one can usually observe how powerful are the influences of the familiar constellations. It is not rare, for instance, for a healthy man whose mother was hysterical to marry a hysteric, or for the daughter of an alcoholic to choose an alcoholic for her husband. I was once consulted by an intelligent and educated young woman of twenty-six who suffered from a peculiar symptom. She thought that her eyes now and then took on a strange expression which exerted a disagreeable influence on men. If she then looked at a man he became self-conscious, turned away and said something rapidly to his neighbour, at which both were either embarrassed or inclined to laugh. The patient was convinced that her look excited indecent thoughts in the men. It was impossible to convince her of the falsity of her conviction. This symptom immediately aroused in me the suspicion that I dealt with a case of paranoia rather than with a neurosis. But as was shown only three days later by the further course of the treatment, I was mistaken, for the symptom promptly disappeared after it had been explained by analysis. It originated in the following manner: The lady had a lover who deserted her in a very marked manner. She felt utterly forsaken; she withdrew from all society and pleasure, and entertained suicidal ideas. In her seclusion there accumulated unadmitted and repressed erotic wishes which she unconsciously projected on men whenever she was in their company. This gave rise to the conviction that her look excited erotic wishes in men. Further investigation showed that her deserting lover was a lunatic, which she had not apparently observed. I expressed my surprise at her unsuitable choice, and added that she must have had a certain predilection for loving mentally abnormal persons. This she denied, stating that she had once before been engaged to be married to a normal man. He, too, deserted her; and on further investigation it was found that he, too, had been in an insane asylum shortly before,—another lunatic! This seemed to me to confirm with sufficient certainty my belief that she had an unconscious tendency to choose insane persons. Whence originated this strange taste? Her father was an eccentric character, and in later years entirely estranged from his family. Her whole love had therefore been turned away from her father to a brother eight years her senior; him she loved and honoured as a father, and this brother became hopelessly insane at the age of fourteen. That was apparently the model from which the patient could never free herself, after which she chose her lovers, and through which she had to become unhappy. Her neurosis which gave the impression of insanity, probably originated from this infantile model. We must take into consideration that we are dealing in this case with a highly educated and intelligent lady, who did not pass carelessly over her mental experiences, who indeed reflected much over her unhappiness, without, however, having any idea whence her misfortune originated.
zh: 首次嘗試建立友誼與愛情的嘗試，最強烈地受到與父母關係的影響，在此通常可以觀察到熟悉的星座配置所產生的影響力有多麼強大。例如，一位母親患有歇斯底里的健康男子，娶了一位歇斯底里的女子，這並非罕見；或者一位酗酒者的女兒，選擇了一位酗酒者作為丈夫，也同樣常見。我曾為一位二十六歲、聰明且受過教育的年輕女子進行諮詢，她因一種奇特症狀而受苦。她認為自己的眼睛時不時會露出一種奇怪的表情，對男人產生令人不快的影響。如果她看著一個男人，他就會變得侷促不安，轉過身去，迅速對鄰座說些什麼，兩人要麼尷尬，要麼傾向於發笑。這位病人堅信，她的目光會激起男人心中不潔的念頭。要說服她相信自己的信念是錯誤的，是不可能的。這個症狀立刻讓我懷疑，我面對的是一例妄想症，而非神經症。然而，正如治療的後續進展在僅僅三天後所顯示的那樣，我錯了，因為這個症狀在經過分析解釋後迅速消失了。它的起源如下：這位女士有一位情人，他以一種非常明顯的方式拋棄了她。她感到徹底被遺棄；她退出所有社交與娛樂活動，並產生了自殺的念頭。在她孤獨的狀態中，積累了未被承認且被壓抑的色情願望，每當她與男人相處時，她便無意識地將這些願望投射到他們身上。這導致了她堅信自己的目光會激起男人心中的色情願望。進一步的調查顯示，那位拋棄她的情人是一名精神病患，而她顯然並未察覺。我對她不當的選擇表示驚訝，並補充說，她一定對愛上精神異常的人有某種偏好。她否認了這一點，聲稱她之前曾與一個正常男人訂婚。他也拋棄了她；經過進一步調查，發現他不久前也曾待在一家精神病院——又是一個精神病患！這在我看來，足以相當確定地證實了我的信念：她有一種無意識的傾向，去選擇精神異常的人。這種奇怪的品味從何而來？她的父親是一個性格古怪的人，晚年與家人完全疏遠。因此，她所有的愛都從父親轉向了一位比她年長八歲的兄長；她像愛父親一樣愛他、尊敬他，而這位兄長在十四歲時便無可救藥地精神失常了。這顯然是那個模型，病人從未從中解脫，並據此選擇了她的情人，也因此不得不變得不幸。她的神經症——給人一種精神錯亂的印象——很可能源於這個嬰兒期的模型。我們必須考慮到，在這個案例中，我們面對的是一位受過高等教育且聰明的女士，她並未輕率地對待自己的精神經歷，反而對自己的不幸進行了許多反思，然而卻完全不知道自己的不幸從何而來。
